name: Oath of Vengeance Spells
description: The magic of your oath ensures you always have certain spells ready; when you reach a Paladin level specified in the Oath of Vengeance Spells table, you thereafter always have the listed spells prepared. Oath of Vengeance Spells table: 3rd – Bane, Hunter's Mark; 5th – Hold Person, Misty Step; 9th – Haste, Protection from Energy; 13th – Banishment, Dimension Door; 17th – Hold Monster, Scrying.
